## Summary

- describe the change
- explain the motivation

## Validation

- list the commands or checks you ran
- include any manual verification notes

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and avoids unrelated refactors
- [ ] Public-facing docs or config references are updated if needed
- [ ] Validation steps and outcomes are included above
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I agree to `CONTRIBUTOR_AGREEMENT.md`
